name: Hip (S.T.A.L.K.E.R Anomaly)
description:
"We taught a chimpanzee to understand the mind of a G.A.M.M.A player and he hanged himself." -Doctor Sakharov

That girl from that very overrated S.T.A.L.K.E.R mod you probably know (Even tho she actually came from a lesser know Stalker mod called 'Last Day'). She doesn't have that much of a personality ingame so i had to write some stuff of my own. SFW intro and no, she won't have sex with you instantly, you gotta work for it. (Hence the RPG element in this bot)

I couldn't find the artist who made this image (he also made his signature so damn hard to read) so i'll have to link the r34 post instead: link
